title: Bedrock Stuff
description: Bedrock Features, Blocks, Items, Advancements? The Bedrock Stuff Mod has!
body:
**The Mod adds different stuff from the Bedrock Edition to Java with self made and remaked features**



![All Mobs (and 1 edited), Items and Blocks from the mod (for Modrinth compressed)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc8d592e005874d6fde1dc8a31e78eb2838c96f1_0.webp)


**Blocks (Bedrock):**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**From Update 18:**

**Allow and Allow (Old):** A block with the property allow to break (basically a normal block)!

**Deny and Deny (Old):** A block with the property not allow to break!

**Stonecutter:** A block from the pocket edition alpha to craft deco stuff. In this mod with a other function.

**Updater:** A deco block.

**Glowing Obsidian:** In this mod a deco block with the property to glow (can be created with the Reactor Core).

**Border:** A wall block with the property not to crossing.

**Reactor Core:** The Highlight block from this mod to create (with a new/(old) structure) a room/tower with nostalgic potential!
Reactor Core Red and Dark Blue are the blocks with the other stages when the event triggered.

**Camera:** Current with no function.



</details>

**Blocks (Education):**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Underwater Torch:** A torch to make light underwater.

**Underwater TNT:** A modifired tnt to blew up underwater.

**Elements:** Around 119 Element Blocks, this block is (allmost) a deco block.

**Element Constructor** -

**Lab Table** ----------------- } The Education blocks to create and destroy the elements! **(This Blocks the config to work)**

**Material Reducer** ------

</details>

**Items (Bedrock):**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**From Update 15:**

**Renderdragon:** The Render Engine from the Bedrock Edition, here a totem for fights with ice and fire or other!

**Portfolio:** Current with a GUI to store your photos.

**Locked Map:** Current with no function.

**Photo:** A Item for the portfolio.

</details>

**Items/Entitys (Education):**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Chalkboard (Small/Medium/Large):** With the function to make chalkboard,s!

**Agent:** A entity from the Education Edition (in this mod) to control this mob with klicking the buttons. **(Needs the config to work)**

**NPC:** The Mob to make the maps for the marketplace. The NPC is current with no function!

</details>

**Advancements (Bedrock/Legacy):**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(a few advancements has a lightly other trigger than normal)**

**The List of all new/ported advancements:**

![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d8099a611d1f61d3bd7ec4cdd71f2303b2488b2.png)


</details>

**Structures:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Trees with vines:** 3 Sizes and generates in all plains and normal forest biomes!

**A death tree:** Generates in all plains and normal forest biomes and has a mushroom on the log!

**Bedrock Reactor:** Generates in all dimensions and has an Reactor Core inside!

</details>

**Gamerules/Keybinds and Commands:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(SINCE UPDATE 17 REPLACED WITH CONFIG!)**

**Bedrockfeatures:** Enabelds the bedrock features for Minecraft Java! (Not in 1.12)

**BedrockStuffDebug:** Enabelds the debug features from this mod that not final or instable. (Not in 1.12)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Up/Down/Left/Right:** Bedrock Block Placeing (1.18 and higher with all solid vanilla blocks. In 1.12 with Dirt, Cobblestone and Stone)

**Space:** Elytra Levitation (Creative only)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**/mayfly:** The command to make the player flying.

**/bedrock_dragon_death:** A command with the property to kill a Ender Dragon in the end before the Dragon reach 0 0 when killed. (Needs the gamerule BedrockStuffDebug to work)

**/armorarms:** The Command to spawn a Armor Stand with "arms"!

</details>

**Ported/Remaked Bedrock Features and Bedrock Config:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**From Update 18.0:**

1. Sugar Cane can now grow with bone meal!
 
2. Enchanting Table/Enchantment Table can now be breaked with the hand!

3. Pigs makes a sound when used a carrot on a stick!

4. Pillager can now drop 0-2 Arrows! (Not in 1.12)
 
5. When a player burning, can now put on a Campfire! (Not in 1.12)

6. When a player holding a wheat, all sheeps and cows given the speed effect in a shape of 5 blocks. (Not in 1.12 and 1.20.4)

7. Snow layer can now mined (rightklick with shovel) and placed in a other position.

8. Candles can now put on with "Fire Aspect"

9. Campfire can now put on with "Fire Aspect"

10. Enchanted Golden Apples gives you a regeneration 4 effect instead of 2

11. Entitys gives particles when burning

**Bedrock Stuff Default Configuration (Update 17.0 - 17.1_01 and Update 18.0):**

![Default Config up to Update 17.1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cef2eae20558d7c1f47f2d70fc8942b736e6fc72.png)
![Default Config above Update 18](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d172ff753ddacfe399df2b5efa12ea0c056c66.png)

</details>
